g.text: MENU
BACK
What is a tesseract?
What style of music is this? What's the right attitude to play it?
Why did you make nested notation? What inspired its creation,
and who inﬂuenced its development?

g.serif:id: Is there any kind of admin
g.text: Is there any kind of admin managing each session?
Is there an end to the piece?
What's the best gear to bring to a nested notation session?
Yes! Although they need not be active in their administration. Here are the actions a session
manager or admin can take during a session:
Create or stop a session
Hold the session (audio still can be played), Pause the session (nothing is displayed on screens)
Vote and quickly hold a session to attempt to force a particular transition
Change the voting or holding durations, adjusting the rhythm/pacing of the transitions
Change the volume of the session audio from the server (individuals still have their own control)
Roll back to a previously visited frame in the session
Change the piece being played in the session
Session content is not dynamic, in the sense that admins cannot write messages on the screen, or
change the graphic or audio content of a piece on the ﬂy.
